### History of Mohamed Sathak Trust

The Mohamed Sathak Trust is a charitable and educational organization founded on October 26, 1973, in Kilakarai by the philanthropic Mohamed Sathak Family from Kilakarai, Ramanathapuram District, Tamil Nadu. The Trust aims to provide quality education to individuals from rural and financially challenged backgrounds.

In 1984, the Trust established the first self-financing engineering college in the country at Kilakarai. Since then, it has been dedicated to de

[Topic: Ourhistory | Origin: ourhistory.txt]
f-financing engineering college in the country at Kilakarai. Since then, it has been dedicated to delivering quality education with academic excellence to meet the demands of both national and international industries.

The Trust operates 18 educational institutions across Kilakarai, Ramanathapuram, and Chennai, offering programs from higher secondary to undergraduate and postgraduate levels in various fields such as Engineering Technology, Arts and Science, Pharmacy, Physiotherapy, Nursing, and

[Topic: Ourhistory | Origin: ourhistory.txt]
rious fields such as Engineering Technology, Arts and Science, Pharmacy, Physiotherapy, Nursing, and Medical Sciences.

The guiding principle of the Trust is the belief that "God will not change the condition of a people until they try to change themselves." The Trust is committed to building an institution of academic excellence and contributing to nation-building with a charitable mindset.
